payload.description:
Plan and execute removal of the prototype OpenSearch vector store once S3 Vectors is proven stable in real-world operation.

## Goal
Retire OpenSearch from this feature path and run only on S3 Vectors while preserving report correctness and operational safety.

## Readiness Gate (must pass before removal)
- S3 Vectors path is green in CI and production-like report runs.
- No unresolved severity-1/0 defects attributable to S3 vector storage/query behavior.
- Real-world report quality is validated across representative scorecards and date windows.
- Rollback procedure is documented and tested.

## Definition of Done
- OpenSearch resources are removed from the prototype CDK stack.
- OpenSearch runtime/config/dependency references are removed from this feature path.
- Post-removal deployment and regression validation complete successfully.
- kbs records contain evidence, links, and a rollback note.
payload.title: OpenSearch Decommission After S3 Vectors Stabilization
